name: fsd
description: Feature-Sliced Design: layer direction appâ†’pagesâ†’widgetsâ†’featuresâ†’entitiesâ†’shared, public slice API.

rules.guidance: Imports flow downward only: appâ†’pagesâ†’widgetsâ†’featuresâ†’entitiesâ†’shared. No slice may import from a higher layer. Cross-slice imports at the same layer go through widgets/pages.
Each slice exposes its public API through a single index.ts. External code imports only from the index; internal modules are private to the slice.
Direct imports of internal slice files (e.g. features/auth/model/store.ts) from other features are forbidden. Use the public index API or lift shared logic to a lower layer.
The shared layer contains only generic, reusable utilities with no business logic. Business logic belongs in entities, features, or higher layers.
